title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Tama, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Law as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is the ace you're waiting for

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Portgas D. Ace,

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Tama?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Memories of his brother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: cough... do you know'n him,

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Big bro?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ACE's dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NooooO WAAAYY!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: You're a liar, big Broooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She fainted. crap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So ace came to Wano, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are you some sort of demon, KNAVE?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you speak the truth, why wouldst you say such a thing now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But no matter how long she waits, ace isn't coming.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be that as it may, there are such things as timing and phrasing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see you have no grasp of delicacy, blasted man! Who in the world even are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm Luffy! I'm going to be pirate King some day! Who are you, old man?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Remember, someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: pirate?! I don't like them on principle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am Hittersu.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "A swordsmith. I also have been waiting for some- one for a very long time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though its inhabitants are now just Tama and myself, there was once a village here. Braided hat village.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Over a year ago, a pirate by the name of X Drake

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: joined Kaido's army as a new "headliner."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the body- guards that were the cornerstone of the village,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those 5 Samurai, were killed. Everything was destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, the only part of Wano that yet prospers

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is the flower capital, where the sho- gun, orochi, resides.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All other lands have, at the hands of Kaido's army,

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: been decimated into lawless wastes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Deci- Mated?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
